default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Promptfoo and GrowthX to discuss content progress, feedback, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant improvement in article quality (e.g., improper output handling) after incorporating feedback](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Content workflow updates: rewriting existing articles, new articles in progress using updated flow](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Discussions ongoing about content delivery timeline and potential creative solutions for unmet expectations](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

## Topics

### Article Quality Improvement

  - ["Improper output handling" article showed night-and-day improvement](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Promptfoo team appreciative of GrowthX's efforts in incorporating feedback](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Next steps: fine-tuning technicalities, aligning more closely with OOS (Open Source Security)](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Vanessa to review updated "improper output handling" article by end of next day](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

### Content Workflow Updates

  - [Vivek rewrote "improper output handling" article, incorporating latest OOS information](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [New articles (e.g., adversarial prompts, supply chain risk) in progress using updated flow](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Previously generated articles moved to "rewriting" status](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Aim: reduce editing load for Promptfoo team](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

### Airtable Organization

  - ["Improper output handling" article moved to "Your Review" section](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Other articles under previous review moved to "Rewriting" section](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [New articles will be placed in "Your Review" upon completion](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

### Addressing Delivery Expectations

  - [Kyle discussing potential creative solutions with Marcel regarding unmet content delivery expectations](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Proposal to schedule a call with key stakeholders to discuss flexible options](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Considerations include ensuring value for payment and potential pause in engagement](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vanessa to review updated "improper output handling" article by end of next day](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Schedule call with key stakeholders (including Ian) to discuss creative solutions for content delivery expectations](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Continue work on new articles using updated flow and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/1g8nPtDfdpWP2zQAz6fogxztoyUbzjs2?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - Await further discussions between Ian and Marcel regarding next steps in the engagement

action_items.description: Review improper output handling article by EOD tomorrow
